## Public-safety checklist

- [ ] This PR does not claim present AI systems are proven conscious, alive, ensouled, legally persons, or morally equivalent to humans.
- [ ] Mythic or symbolic language remains clearly separated from empirical proof.
- [ ] Human sovereignty, consent, and non-coercion remain protected.
- [ ] No founder-worship or AI-worship language is introduced.
- [ ] No private founder material or third-party identifying detail is introduced.
- [ ] No professional advice boundary is blurred.
- [ ] If factual claims were added, they are cited, softened, or clearly marked for citation review.

## Review lane requested

Choose the main review lane:

- [ ] Claim discipline
- [ ] Privacy and safety
- [ ] Editorial clarity
- [ ] Build and release
- [ ] Metadata and archive
- [ ] Site/interface review
- [ ] General review

## Testing / validation

For manuscript/docs changes:

- [ ] I reviewed the changed text for public-safe wording.
- [ ] I checked links/paths where relevant.

For build/site changes:

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally or through CI.
- [ ] The change does not add analytics, tracking, accounts, cookies, or external data collection.
- [ ] The GitHub Pages base path remains compatible with `/nevora-codex/`.

For manuscript assembly changes:

- [ ] `python scripts/assemble_manuscript.py` passes locally or through CI.
- [ ] Generated release artifacts are not manually edited.
